composition: A large chalk-style bust of a classical philosopher (likely Socrates or Aristotle) dominates the center-left against a deep blackboard-green background, with soft chalk texture filling the frame.
typography: Bold, white sans-serif title text in two lines sits in the lower portion of the image, moderately large with clean weight, contrasting sharply against the dark background.
hook_text: 2 Hours of Philosophy That Makes Everything Clearer
color_palette: Deep blackboard green dominant, white chalk accent, faint beige/ivory for bust highlights
click_worthy_reason: The promise of mental clarity combined with the approachable chalk-art aesthetic signals intellectual comfort rather than challenge, drawing in viewers seeking calm enlightenment.
